Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 v 

Tips on Navigating the Codebook 

The Transformed Medicaid Statistical Information System (T-MSIS) Analytic Files (TAF) claims files include all “final 
action” Medicaid and Children’s Health Insurance Program (CHIP) service records for a given year (i.e., all T-MSIS 
claims Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS) determined to be final, as of the TAF creation date). The claims
